site.title: The Winning Formula | Nasdaq
site.description: Nasdaq's original series connecting the business of sport with the business of capital.

items.headline: The Winning Formula Is Nominated for a Shorty Award for Best Branded Content Series
Reggie Bush Announces his New United Athlete Tour On The Winning Formula
Mercedes AMG PETRONAS Formula 1 Team and Nasdaq Launch a New Winning Formula Offshoot Called "Accelerating Leadership"
The Winning Formula is a 2026 Webby Honoree In the "Best Branded Podcast" Category
Terrence Murphy Announces The new Synergy Sports Capital Firm In Partnership with Reggie Bush
Former NBA MVP Derrick Rose Announces his New Book "The Pooh Print" on The Winning Formula

wordmarkFallback.title: The Winning Formula
wordmarkFallback.subtitle: Presented by Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team

hero.intro: We invite high profile guests from around the sporting world, from athlete entrepreneurs to league executives, to discuss the similarities and through-lines between the sports and business world.

featured.headline: From the end zone to the endowment.
featured.subtitle: Super Bowl XLIV Champion · Champion Venture Partners
featured.pullQuote: I started to realize that not only are we solving for the athlete investor, we're solving for the retail investor as well.
featured.body: Marques Colston joins The Winning Formula to break down the founding of Champion Venture Partners, the rise of the sports asset class, and how he's translating locker-room discipline into disciplined capital allocation.
featured.bylineMeta: Recorded at Nasdaq MarketSite, Times Square

episodes.subtitle: 2x World Cup Champion · USWNT
episodes.title: The business case for women's sports — and 'Sports Are Fun!'
episodes.description: Kelley O'Hara on the explosive growth of women's sports and how her podcast is reshaping athlete-led media.

episodes.subtitle: NBA All-Star · Founder, BIGFACE Coffee
episodes.title: "It's not always going to go the way you think — you gotta be able to pivot."
episodes.description: From NBA stardom to BIGFACE Coffee, on adaptability and the power of the pivot.

episodes.subtitle: 11x Olympic Medalist · Saysh Co-founder
episodes.title: Legacy, entrepreneurship, and building a shoe brand for women.
episodes.description: The most decorated track-and-field Olympian in American history on her next chapter.

episodes.subtitle: NBA Champion · Web3 Ambassador
episodes.title: Financial literacy, Web3, and how the NBA has evolved.
episodes.description: The NBA champion on building beyond the court and what athletes need to know about money.

episodes.subtitle: NBA Veteran · Entrepreneur
episodes.title: How the court prepared him for a career in business.
episodes.description: CJ McCollum on discipline, investment, and the NBA's evolution since he entered the league.

episodes.subtitle: Free Solo Climber · Honnold Foundation
episodes.title: Risk, routine, and the economics of the impossible.
episodes.description: The free-solo climbing icon on calculated risk, philanthropy, and long-term focus.

episodes.subtitle: 2x Masters Champion · LIV Golf
episodes.title: On legacy, LIV, and the long view of a career.
episodes.description: The two-time Masters winner on the next chapter of professional golf and building a brand.

episodes.subtitle: Mercedes-AMG Petronas F1 Team
episodes.title: Accelerating Leadership — the Mercedes-AMG Petronas F1 story.
episodes.description: Toto Wolff and George Russell on building a championship team and the business behind the grid.

episodes.subtitle: F1 Driver · 10x Grand Prix Winner
episodes.title: Motivation, race prep, and reinvention mid-career.
episodes.description: The F1 veteran on how his drive to win has evolved and what keeps him fast.

people.name: Joel Kolani
people.title: Head of Brand Strategy & Creative Content · Nasdaq
people.bio: A former sports radio host with expertise across the NFL, NBA, MLB, European soccer, and F1. Joel leads brand storytelling at Nasdaq and brings a journalist's instincts to every conversation.

people.name: Poppy Shen
people.title: Journalist & Video Producer · Nasdaq
people.bio: A journalist and video producer with experience at Yahoo, AOL, and CNN. Poppy has covered stories spanning sports, culture, and the AAPI community, and brings depth and empathy to every interview.
